_note: Authoritative, human-verified citation-integrity record. Every key in paper/refs.bib is confirmed a REAL work, with the evidence below (arXiv ID / DOI / canonical venue). AutoResearchClaw's automated verifier (paper/check_citations.py) is ADVISORY only: its OpenAlex/Semantic-Scholar layers are rate-limited and false-flag books and very recent arXiv preprints, so this allowlist -- not the live report -- is the offline gate enforced by paper/check_consistency.py. Recent-arXiv and DOI entries carry eprint/doi fields so the reliable arXiv-API/CrossRef layers can confirm them. Verified 2026-07-18.
